    A

    addReply(int, int, String, String) - Method in class applicationMain.GradingService
    Adds a reply while preserving who authored the original post.

    The applicationMain package is used to hold the mainline classes for the application.

    E

    entityClasses - package entityClasses
    Domain entities for the discussion system, including posts, replies, and user-related models.

    G

    getAnswersForReview(String) - Method in class applicationMain.GradingService
    Returns all replies authored by a student for quick reasonableness review.
    getStudentsWithReplies() - Method in class guiGradebook.ModelGradebook
     
    GradingService - Class in applicationMain
    Service class for grading student discussions based on their replies.

    Builds a grading service around the shared post/reply stores.
